languages.text: "Какая насмешка: вы грозите карой за ересь, сами играя роль в ксеносской ловушке!"

traits.locale_text: "Какая насмешка: вы грозите карой за ересь, сами играя роль в ксеносской ловушке!"

languages.text: "What a farce! You punish heresy with death, and yet all the while you are playing a part in a xenos trap!"
languages.original_text: "Какая насмешка: вы грозите карой за ересь, сами играя роль в ксеносской ловушке!"

traits.locale_text: "What a farce! You punish heresy with death, and yet all the while you are playing a part in a xenos trap!"
"What a farce! You punish heresy with death, and yet all the while you are playing a part in a xenos trap!"
"What a farce! You punish heresy with death, and yet all the while you are playing a part in a xenos trap!"

languages.text: “真是场闹剧！你们以异端之名处死别人，自己却在给异形的陷阱当帮凶！”
languages.original_text: "What a farce! You punish heresy with death, and yet all the while you are playing a part in a xenos trap!"

traits.locale_text: “真是场闹剧！你们以异端之名处死别人，自己却在给异形的陷阱当帮凶！”

languages.text: « Quelle mascarade ! Vous punissez de mort l'hérésie, et en même temps, vous prêtez la main à un piège orchestré par les xénos ! »
languages.original_text: "What a farce! You punish heresy with death, and yet all the while you are playing a part in a xenos trap!"

traits.locale_text: « Quelle mascarade ! Vous punissez de mort l'hérésie, et en même temps, vous prêtez la main à un piège orchestré par les xénos ! »

languages.text: "Ne büyük saçmalık! Bir yandan kâfirliği ölümle cezalandırıyor, diğer yandan zeno tuzağında rol alıyorsun!"
languages.original_text: "What a farce! You punish heresy with death, and yet all the while you are playing a part in a xenos trap!"

traits.locale_text: "Ne büyük saçmalık! Bir yandan kâfirliği ölümle cezalandırıyor, diğer yandan zeno tuzağında rol alıyorsun!"

languages.text: «¡Menuda farsa! ¡Castiga la herejía con la muerte, pero forma parte de una trampa xenos!».
languages.original_text: "What a farce! You punish heresy with death, and yet all the while you are playing a part in a xenos trap!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Menuda farsa! ¡Castiga la herejía con la muerte, pero forma parte de una trampa xenos!».

languages.text: "Was für eine Farce! Ihr bestraft Ketzerei mit dem Tod und seid gleichzeitig Teil einer Falle eines Xenos!"
languages.original_text: "What a farce! You punish heresy with death, and yet all the while you are playing a part in a xenos trap!"

traits.locale_text: "Was für eine Farce! Ihr bestraft Ketzerei mit dem Tod und seid gleichzeitig Teil einer Falle eines Xenos!"

languages.text: 「何というお粗末な状況だ！異端を死刑で罰する一方で、お前たちは異種族の罠に嵌まっているのだ！」
languages.original_text: "What a farce! You punish heresy with death, and yet all the while you are playing a part in a xenos trap!"

traits.locale_text: 「何というお粗末な状況だ！異端を死刑で罰する一方で、お前たちは異種族の罠に嵌まっているのだ！」
